ns2:test-suite.name: Sending the looks to the mirror successfully,
ns2:test-suite.title: Sending the looks to the mirror successfully,

test-case.name: should be able to send looks to the mirror

failure.message: CompoundError: One or more errors occurred. --- Error: Timeout - Async function did not complete within 110000ms (set by jasmine.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_INTERVAL) at <Jasmine> at listOnTimeout (internal/timers.js:549:17) at processTimers (internal/timers.js:492:7) --- End of stack trace --- at <Jasmine> at ShopfloorCommonPage.logout (/Users/sof.machines/qa-end-to-end/tests/ShopfloorApp/pageobjects/shopfloorcommon.page.js:34:49) at UserContext.<anonymous> (/Users/sof.machines/qa-end-to-end/tests/ShopfloorApp/specs/shopfloorAndMirror/assignLooksToMirror.spec.js:13:29) --- End of stack trace ---
